overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark clothing walking through a snowy mountain trail at night. The scene features a cold winter atmosphere with snow-covered trees, distant castle spires, and mountain peaks visible under a cloudy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered forest trail with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy path through the forested area

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running along the left side of the snowy path
dense forest of snow-laden trees lining both sides of the trail
tall gothic castle spires visible through the trees in the distance
snow-capped mountain peaks under the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snow-covered trail flanked by dense snow-laden trees. A wooden fence runs along the left side of the path while distant castle spires and mountains are visible through the trees ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy trail alongside stone wall with small wooden structure

events.description: character turns left to follow the path alongside a stone wall

agents.ego_description: turning left to follow the path alongside a stone wall and small wooden building

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left side of the path
small rustic wooden structure visible behind the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns left, leaving the wooden fence behind, and walks alongside a stone wall with a small wooden shed visible behind it. The path continues through the snowy landscape with mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy meadow trail with other travelers

events.description: other travelers appear ahead on the path
passes by other travelers on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking forward and passing other travelers on the snowy trail

notable_agents.action: group of travelers walking ahead on the snowy path
traveler in light clothing walking in the same direction

entered.detail: tall frost-covered grass lining the right side of the path
wooden signpost with directional markers beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The character encounters other travelers walking along the open snowy trail. Tall grass lines the right side of the path as the character passes the group of travelers and approaches a wooden signpost.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain trail with signpost and distant views

events.description: passes by a person in red clothing on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open trail past the signpost

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing standing near the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past the wooden signpost through the open snowy landscape. A person in red clothing stands near the path on the left as the distant castle shifts to the left side of the frame, with snow-covered mountains dominating the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain trail that transitions from a sheltered, wooded path into an open winter landscape. It begins with the character walking a narrow trail flanked by dense, snow-laden trees and a wooden fence, with distant castle spires peering through the foliage. As the character turns left, the fence gives way to a stone wall and a small wooden shed before the terrain opens up into a wider expanse. The scene then shifts as the character passes a group of fellow travelers and a wooden signpost, with tall grass lining the right side of the path. Finally, the camera moves past a figure in red clothing as the castle recedes to the left, leaving the towering, snow-covered mountains to dominate the horizon.
